name: smart-hospitality-management
description: AI-powered Smart Hospitality Management System (100% Free Stack)

scripts.setup: npm run setup:frontend && npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:ai
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:ai" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:ai
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:ai
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd backend && npx prisma migrate reset

author: Your Name
